# Walkthrough: Scaffolding a Derived Concept

This walkthrough creates a `Registration` derived concept.

## Step 1: Generate the Scaffold

```bash
clef scaffold derived --name Registration \
  --param T \
  --composes User,Email,Profile \
  --syncs user-created-sends-welcome:required,profile-init:recommended
```

Output:
```
Created concepts/registration.stub.derived
```

## Step 2: Define Surface Actions

Edit `registration.derived`:

```
surface {
  action register(email: String, name: String) {
    entry: User/create [on email: ?e]
    triggers: [
      Email/sendWelcome(to: ?e),
      Profile/init(owner: ?e)
    ]
  }

  query status(userId: String) -> User/get(id: ?userId)
}
```

## Step 3: Write the Principle

```
principle {
  after register(email: e, name: n)
  then User/create(email: e, name: n) -> ok
  and  Email/sendWelcome(to: e) -> ok
  and  Profile/init(owner: e) -> ok
}
```
